tools.name: Color Block
tools.description: Colour blocks — text, headshot, logo — auto-arranged into a grid.

tools.name: Dynamic Layout
tools.description: A do-anything layout that recomposes around whatever you add, at any size.

tools.name: Quote Card
tools.description: On-brand quote cards for social posts and slides.

tools.name: Meeting Planner
tools.description: Plan a global meeting and see the time for every teammate's timezone.

tools.name: Code Canvas
tools.description: Turn code snippets into clean, syntax-highlighted, shareable images.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: On-brand QR codes for any URL, with full color and style control.

tools.name: Day Brief
tools.description: Quote of the day with live weather, time and a map for any city.

tools.name: Logo
tools.description: Place the SUSE logo — it auto-picks the right variant and exports vector.

tools.name: Email Signature
tools.description: An on-brand SUSE email signature, ready to paste into any client.

tools.name: Chart Creator
tools.description: On-brand charts from your data — bar, donut, pie or stacked.

tools.name: Bag Video
tools.description: An animated, on-brand video for bag visuals.

tools.name: Duotone Filter
tools.description: A two-color duotone for any photo — shadows one color, highlights another.

tools.name: Color Palette
tools.description: Browse SUSE brand colors — click a swatch to copy it.

tools.name: Countdown Timer
tools.description: A focused countdown with a live progress ring. Click to pause.

tools.name: URL Screenshot
tools.description: Any web page, at any scroll-depth, with custom CSS

tools.name: Street Map
tools.description: Clean vector street-block maps of any city. Works offline.

tools.name: Strip Hidden Data
tools.description: Reveal and remove hidden metadata from images and PDFs — on your device.

tools.name: Text Helper
tools.description: Format, decode, hash and de-identify text — JSON, JWT and more.

tools.name: Event Name Badge
tools.description: Conference name badges with a colour-coded role and optional QR.

tools.name: Wayfinding Signage
tools.description: Directional event signs — destinations, each with an arrow. Print-ready.

tools.name: Brand Lockup
tools.description: Official SUSE logo lockups — chameleon, wordmark and a name.

tools.name: Halftone Filter
tools.description: Vector halftone from any photo — dots sized by brightness.

tools.name: Animated Ad
tools.description: Build animated ads from layered scenes for any standard size.

tools.name: Calendar ICS
tools.description: Turn event details into a calendar (.ics) file for any calendar app.

tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Shrink a PDF by recompressing its images — on your device.

tools.name: Scanline Filter
tools.description: Retro scanline effect from any photo in brand tones.
